business_question: What is the average denial resolution time by denial reason?
business_context: Revenue cycle managers want to identify denial categories taking the longest to resolve and delaying reimbursement recovery.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    DENIAL_REASON,
    COUNT(*) AS DENIAL_COUNT,
    AVG(DENIAL_RESOLUTION_DAYS) AS AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.HEALTHCARE.MART_REVENUE_LEAKAGE
WHERE IS_DENIED = TRUE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS DESC;
